name: Memory (MemWal)
description: Encrypted, decentralized long-term memory via MemWal + Walrus

accountId.description: Default MemWalAccount object ID on Sui (0x...)

agentKeys.description: Per-agent key+account mapping. Keys from different MemWalAccounts = isolated memory.

mock.description: Enable mock mode (in-memory storage, no real server)

autoRecall.description: Auto-inject relevant memories before each turn

autoCapture.description: Auto-extract and store facts after each turn

privateKey.label: Ed25519 Private Key
privateKey.help: Default key for all agents. Supports ${ENV_VAR} syntax.

accountId.label: MemWalAccount ID
accountId.help: MemWalAccount object ID on Sui. Get from app.memwal.com.

mock.label: Mock Mode
mock.help: Use in-memory storage instead of real MemWal server. For demo/testing.

agentKeys.label: Per-Agent Keys
agentKeys.help: Map agent names to Ed25519 keys for memory isolation.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant memories before each turn

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Extract and store facts after each turn
